metadata.title: FLUX.2 Flet - AI Image Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: FLUX.2 Flet by Black Forest Labs. Advanced image editing API that transforms photos with simple text commands, delivering professional results. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

items.title: What is FLUX.2 Flet?
items.description: FLUX.2 Flet is Black Forest Labs' advanced image editing API that transforms photos with simple text commands for professional results.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: FLUX.2 Flet supports both Text To Image (generating images from text descriptions) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: How does text-command editing work?
items.description: Simply describe the changes you want in text, and FLUX.2 Flet applies professional-quality transformations to your images.

items.title: Is it good for e-commerce?
items.description: Yes! FLUX.2 Flet is optimized for e-commerce, helping optimize product listings with quick, professional edits.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images generated or edited with FLUX.2 Flet through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: How fast is the editing?
items.description: FLUX.2 Flet delivers quick turnaround times, making it ideal for efficient workflow integration.

cta.title: Ready to Try FLUX.2 Flet?
cta.description: Experience Black Forest Labs' cutting-edge image editing. Transform photos with simple text commands.
